use_cases: Book appointment slots with coaches or service providers
Display coach profile with ratings and review counts
Navigate between weeks to view available time slots
Select location from a dropdown for multi-location services
Filter and choose from available time slots for scheduling
ai_summary: A scheduling card component for booking appointments with coaches or service providers, featuring a coach profile with ratings, week-based calendar navigation, location selection dropdown, and interactive time slot selection. Built with Framer Motion for smooth animations and includes props for customization, making it ideal for sports, fitness, or service booking platforms.
